title: Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
summary: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, discusses Anthropic's frontier models Fable and Mythos during a period when the government forced the company to pull them from the market. Krieger describes how Fable enables new workflows like queuing up full nights of work before bed, and characterizes Anthropic's safety warnings as material rather than marketing.
writeup: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and co-founder of Instagram, discusses Anthropic's frontier models Fable and Mythos during a period when the government forced the company to pull them from the market. He describes how Fable supports new agentic workflows, including queuing up full nights of work before bed, and frames Anthropic's safety warnings as material rather than marketing. The conversation covers AI agents, frontier models, and the practical questions of building AI-native products.
